title: COPY BINARY INTO fails on 6gb file; works fine on 3gb
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_large_file (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, data BLOB NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_large_file (data) VALUES (CAST('large_data' AS BLOB));
CREATE TABLE temp_data (foo DOUBLE, bar VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO temp_data (foo, bar) VALUES (1.0, 'test'), (2.0, NULL);
INSERT INTO test_large_file (data) SELECT data FROM temp_data WHERE bar IS NULL;
key_bug_features: COPY BINARY INTO fails on large file sizes
